scripts.openspec:check: if grep -rE '^TBD - created by archiving' openspec/specs/ --include='*.md' -l 2>/dev/null; then echo 'ERROR: master specs contain post-archive TBD placeholders at line start. Complete the Purpose section before merging.' >&2; exit 1; fi; if grep -rE '^(## )?Purpose: TBD' openspec/specs/ --include='*.md' -l 2>/dev/null; then echo 'ERROR: master specs contain Purpose: TBD. Complete the Purpose section before merging.' >&2; exit 1; fi; echo 'openspec:check OK'
